HomePage.title:
Welcome to the
Luxor Economy.
HomePage.subtitle: Luxor (LXR) drives the Luxor network as its public liquidity engine. Designed for utility, stability, and growth directly on Solana.

reserve.title: Real World Backing
reserve.description: Luxor represents liquidity in a vast ecosystem secured by real-world assets and transparent on-chain governance.

liquidity.title: Liquidity Engine
liquidity.description: With a supply of 2.025B, LXR facilitates seamless, high-volume transactions across the entire ecosystem.

speed.title: Solana Speed & Security
speed.description: Leveraging Solana's Token-2022 program for enforceable royalties, secure transfers, and sub-second finality.

allocation.title: Transparent Allocation
allocation.description: Our distribution model ensures long-term sustainability. The vast majority of tokens are held in the secure Squads Multisig Vault to support market stability.

innovation.title: What exactly is Luxor?
innovation.subtitle: Luxor (LXR) is the native utility token of the Luxor ecosystem. It is not a passive asset; it is an active tool designed for those who create, undertake, and consume in the new digital economy.
innovation.desc: By using LXR, you don't just own an asset on Solana; you get superpowers within our network:

items.title: Exclusive Discounts
items.desc: Pay for business and personal administration services with direct benefits.

items.title: Access to Experiences
items.desc: Your LXR balance is your ticket to events, advanced tools, and premium features of the ecosystem.

items.title: Consumption Savings
items.desc: Get benefits in partner merchants, from coffee shops to technology, through our payment gateway.

items.title: Active Governance
items.desc: Participate in the development of new functions. Your voice helps decide where the engine grows.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy: The Hemisphere of Abundance
philosophy.subtitle: Born in Salt Lake City, Luxor aligns with the innovation values of the Western tech corridor. We believe that abundance is not waited for, it is created.

items.title: No Borders
items.desc: A tool for the entrepreneur in the United States, the professional in Latin America, and anyone in the American continent seeking to prosper.

items.title: Support and Stability
items.desc: Built on Solana's ultra-fast infrastructure, Luxor integrates the efficiency of the digital dollar so that the global economy reaches every corner.

items.title: For All Generations
items.desc: From digital natives to those seeking to modernize their century-old businesses. Luxor is easy, accessible, and universal.

architecture.title: Functional Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Instead of highlighting scarcity, we highlight predictability for the user and commerce.

items.title: Defined Network Capacity
items.desc: We have a fixed volume of units to ensure that the ecosystem always has the necessary fuel to operate without unexpected inflation.

items.title: Programmed Autonomy
items.desc: LXR works under open-source rules on Solana. No central entity can change the rules of use, giving you total security.

items.title: Circular Economy
items.desc: 100% of the proceeds are used to strengthen the technical infrastructure and ensure that tools remain fast and economic.

vital.title: Why is it vital to do this now?
vital.desc: The world is at an inflection point. Technology is no longer an option; it is the language of survival. While other regions fragment, the American Hemisphere stands as a beacon of untapped synergy. For years, the gap between capital and talent has limited our collective potential. Luxor is here to bridge that gap, creating a unified digital infrastructure from Salt Lake City to the farthest corners of the Americas.

items.title: A Unified Economic Bloc
items.desc: Demographics is Destiny. While other global powers face aging populations and stagnation, the Americas pulse with a youthful, tech-native energy. By aligning the US innovation model with the talent of the entire hemisphere, we are not just building a network—we are building the most resilient and dynamic economic bloc on the planet.

items.title: Hemispheric Stability
items.desc: Security through Prosperity. A prosperous hemisphere is a secure hemisphere. Luxor facilitates the flow of utility and digital tools across borders, eradicating the lack of opportunity that generates instability. We are replacing borders with bridges, ensuring that the 'American Dream' of technological progress is a shared reality for everyone in our hemisphere.

items.title: The Era of Abundance
items.desc: Harnessing AI & Robotics. We are transitioning from an economy of scarcity to one of abundance. Luxor ensures the Americas don't just witness the AI revolution, but lead it. From Silicon Slopes to every city in the continent, we provide the liquidity engine for the skilled workforce and creative minds behind the algorithms of tomorrow.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: A Future of Limitless Collaboration
vision.desc1: The United States has proven that an ecosystem based on freedom and innovation can generate global wealth with 350 million inhabitants. At Luxor, we ask a bold question: What could this model achieve if integrated with the human potential of the more than 650 million inhabitants in Latin America?
vision.desc2: We do not simply seek profit; we seek the extension of prosperity to the entire hemisphere. We want to turn Latin America into the definitive strategic partner, transforming a region of immense potential into a growth engine that doubles the capabilities of the global economy. Imagine a continent where the next tech unicorn is born not only in Silicon Valley, but also in the connected minds of Medellín, Mexico City, or Buenos Aires, operating under the same standard of global excellence.

giants.title: Aligned with the Giants of Tomorrow
giants.desc: We walk toward the frontier of what is possible, inspired by the vision of the leaders redesigning our species today:

items.name: Elon Musk
items.desc: His pursuit of an interplanetary humanity teaches us that we shouldn't limit ourselves to terrestrial borders.

items.name: Economic Perspective
items.desc: Deep analysis of macroeconomic variables and global technological impact.

items.name: Mark Zuckerberg
items.desc: His focus on global connectivity shows us that the world is a single network.

items.name: Markets & Strategy
items.desc: Future vision on the movements of smart capital.

items.name: Jensen Huang
items.desc: They aim to democratize AI so that any human can be as productive as an entire company.

items.name: Alejandro Salomón
items.desc: Visionary entrepreneur discussing the future of digital assets and technological innovation.

builders.title: Elite Infrastructure
builders.subtitle: Your talent deserves an infrastructure at its level.

merchants.title: Global Market
merchants.subtitle: Transform the way your company interacts with the global market.

customers.title: Premium Access
customers.subtitle: Access to the abundance and premium treatment you deserve.

join.title: The future is not watched, it is built.
join.subtitle: Join Luxor, because Luxor is you.

pillars.title: Our Vision for the Americas
pillars.desc: We are building a future defined by AI, advanced robotics, and decentralized utility. Our mission is to dismantle the barriers that have kept economies fragmented for decades. We are the digital bridge for a hemisphere that creates, innovates, and leads.

items.title: A Stronger, Unified North America
items.desc: Fortifying Global Leadership. By fostering a strategic technological alliance across the hemisphere, we ensure the U.S. remains the world's innovation engine, backed by a resilient and integrated supply chain of talent and digital assets.

items.title: The Great American Awakening
items.desc: From Resources to Innovation. We are shifting the continent's focus from exporting raw materials to becoming the world's premier exporter of software, AI, and high-tech solutions. The entire hemisphere, from north to south, is the new frontier of the digital era.

items.title: Exponential Value Creation
items.desc: Abundance as the New Standard. We empower a new generation of builders, entrepreneurs, and visionaries. In the Luxor economy, creating massive value is the rule, not the exception. We provide the tools for those who dare to build the infrastructure of tomorrow.

cta.title: Join the Luxor Movement!
cta.desc: Are you one of those who stay and watch the future happen, or one of those who write it? Luxor is the bridge. We are the catalyst for Latin talent and American innovation capital to converge. We invite you to be part of this new era.

TeamPage.title: Transparency & Team
TeamPage.subtitle: Built on trust, verified by code. We prioritize security and legal compliance.
TeamPage.legal_genius: GENIUS Act 2026: Fully compliant with new stablecoin and digital asset regulations.
TeamPage.legal_utility: Utility Token: $LXR is designed as a utility token for ecosystem governance and rewards. It is NOT a security.
TeamPage.legal_disclaimer: Disclaimer: Crypto assets are volatile. Invest responsibly. No profit guarantees.

RoadmapPage.title: Roadmap
RoadmapPage.subtitle: Our journey to bridge Memes and Real Assets.

mega.intro_desc: Explore how Luxor is transforming real-world liquidity through advanced blockchain technology.

Navbar.coming_soon: Luxor will soon show you that you are also part of the future

Metadata.title: Luxor (LXR) | The Intelligence of Value
Metadata.description:
General Vision
Luxor ($LXR) is a next-generation utility token deployed on the Solana network, designed to be the economic engine of an ecosystem driven by Artificial Intelligence. Conceived and structured meticulously throughout 2025 (01/01/2025 - 12/31/2025), Luxor is born with the mission to strengthen the economy of the Western Hemisphere and consolidate the United States as the global capital of digital assets.

Tokenomics and Launch
Total Supply: 2.025 billion $LXR (Commemorative figure to the year of its structuring).

Fractional Units: The cents of Luxor are called LUX.

Official Launch of $LXR: On May 1, 2026, at midnight, the main liquidity will be activated through the Meteora or Raydium protocols.
Fractional Ecosystem (LUX): The cents of Luxor, called LUX, function as a pegged asset and their trading initials will be LUX. To ensure dynamic distribution from the start, the launch of LUX will take place on the same day as the presale via the Pump.fun platform, allowing agile initial access to the project's economy.

Transparency: The entire roadmap and technical fundamentals are available in our public repository for community auditing.

Utility Ecosystem and Products
$LXR is not just a currency; it is the access key to a suite of technological products developed by the project's sponsoring companies:

Roosevelt AI (AI): An autonomous Artificial Intelligence agent integrated into Solana, capable of independently managing personal life and high-level business management.

Smart Hardware: Advanced development of smart glasses with native integration to the Luxor ecosystem.

Global Payment Gateway: A financial infrastructure designed for instant and secure transactions.

These products will be released in phases upon reaching specific milestones of $LXR per capita accumulation in the market.

Continental Commitment
Luxor is focused on the well-being and abundance of the entire American continent. We seek to forge a path to the technological future while respecting the cultural diversity of each nation, from north to south, promoting financial sovereignty based on the innovation and technological development of the West.
